description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with the global image rays3t/sourcemod-plugins-builder-ci and two stages: build and compress-fdl. In the build stage add a build:core job that runs spcomp, then mkdir package, cp -r resources/* package, mkdir -p package/addons/sourcemod/scripting/include, mkdir -p package/addons/sourcemod/plugins, cp compiled/*.smx package/addons/sourcemod/plugins, cp *.sp package/addons/sourcemod/scripting, cp include/*.inc package/addons/sourcemod/scripting/include, and cd package && rm -rf *.md, publishing package/* as an artifact named ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}_core_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} and setting AUTO_VERSION_REPLACE='1'. Also in the build stage add a build:modules job that runs spcomp, then mkdir package, cp -r magicdice/resources/* package, mkdir -p package/addons/sourcemod/scripting/include, mkdir -p package/addons/sourcemod/plugins, cp magicdice/compiled/*.smx package/addons/sourcemod/plugins, cp magicdice/*.sp package/addons/sourcemod/scripting, cp include/*.inc package/addons/sourcemod/scripting/include, and cd package && rm -rf *.md, publishing package/* as an artifact named ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}_modules_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} while defining AUTO_VERSION_REPLACE='1' and BUILD_DIR=${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/magicdice. Also in the build stage add a build:scripts job that uses the sklemmer/gitlab-shellcheck image and runs shellcheck scripts/updater.sh. In the compress-fdl stage add a compress-fdl job that uses alpine:latest, runs before_script apk update and apk add bzip2, then mkdir fastdl, mkdir -p fastdl/sound, cp -r magicdice/resources/sound/* fastdl/sound/, removes all *.md files under fastdl, compresses every file in fastdl with bzip2 -v -z, and stores fastdl/* as an artifact named ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}_fastdl_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}.
